title: Integrating ToF-SIMS and machine learning reveals a mammary tumor-associated multi-ion signature — analysis code
description: Analysis code, result tables, and figures for a time-of-flight secondary ion mass spectrometry (ToF-SIMS) machine-learning study of a mammary tumor-associated multi-ion signature and its detectability across biological samples in the MMTV-PyMT mouse model of breast cancer. Accompanies the article by Manaprasertsak et al.
